metadata.title: SocialPro - AI Carousel & Content Creator
metadata.description: Create cinematic carousels and magnetic posts for social media in seconds using cutting-edge Artificial Intelligence.

landing.heroBadge: New update: AI v2.0 live with carousel support
landing.heroH1: The secret tool of the biggest <highlight>creators</highlight> on LinkedIn & Instagram.
landing.heroDesc: Create cinematic carousels, highly persuasive copy based on consumer psychology and manage your entire editorial calendar with the most powerful AI on the market.
landing.howDesc: Master the social media algorithm by following these 4 practical steps in our studio.
landing.step1Desc: Define your identity, niche and business context. AI learns your voice in seconds.
landing.step2Desc: Select a high-engagement structure from the viral idea bank and set the ideal post tone.
landing.step3Desc: Enter your raw draft and let AI generate the slide script and copy optimized for the algorithm.
landing.step4Desc: Preview the post in real time on the phone mockup and schedule publication directly in the calendar.
landing.featDesc: Let AI structure your ideas while you focus on branding and engagement.
landing.card1Desc: Write raw ideas and let the system draw and arrange the slides. Choose from cinematic gradients and algorithm-validated structures that keep readers swiping to the last page.
landing.card2Desc: Adjust AI guidelines with four modes and watch the caption writing style transform in real time in the simulator below.
landing.toneProvocativoCopy: 97% of LinkedIn creators will fail in 2026. The problem isn't artificial intelligence — it's the laziness of creating strong hooks. If you're still posting friction-free text blocks, sorry: you're writing into the void. Comment 'WANT' to receive the secret.
landing.toneAutoridadeCopy: We analyzed over 1,200 Instagram carousels in Q1 2026. Data shows slides with reduced information density and display fonts (e.g. Outfit Bold) retain readers 42% longer. Here is the exact checklist from our design methodology.
landing.toneStorytellerCopy: In 2024, I spent 3 months posting every day. The result? Zero clients and 15 likes per post. I was about to give up when I realized that what connects isn't your success, but your journey through it. That's when I decided to change the narrative. See how it worked.
landing.toneMemeCopy:
Me promising myself I'll sleep early on Sunday to start the week rested 😴

Me that same Sunday at 3:45am, addicted to creating carousels and refining copy with SocialPro AI 🤡
landing.card3Desc: Set up your name, avatar and social media handle globally. AI inserts this data into every generated mockup in real time.
landing.card4Desc: Monitor your weekly consistency through the minimalist planner and evaluate estimated post engagement with the interactive SVG line chart.
landing.sched3Title: How to go from zero to $10k
landing.footer: © 2026 SocialPro. All rights reserved. Design inspired by Linear & Refirme.
landing.faqDesc: We answer the main questions before you get started.
landing.faq1q: Do I need design skills to use SocialPro?
landing.faq1a: No. The AI generates the slides, choosing typography, colors and composition based on your Brand Kit. You just approve the result.
landing.faq2q: Can I use my own visual identity?
landing.faq2a: Yes. In the Brand Kit you set your name, handle, avatar and color palette. Everything is automatically applied to all generated carousels.
landing.faq3q: How long does it take to generate a carousel?
landing.faq3a: On average, between 30 and 90 seconds. The time varies with the number of slides and complexity of AI-generated images.
landing.faq4q: Can I cancel my plan whenever I want?
landing.faq4a: Yes. No loyalty contracts. Cancel or change plans at any time in your account settings.
landing.faq5q: Do carousels only work on Instagram?
landing.faq5a: SocialPro is optimized for Instagram, but the visual format also works great for LinkedIn and X (Twitter).
landing.ctaFinalDesc: No credit card required. Cancel anytime.

pricing.title: Choose the perfect plan for your growth.
pricing.subtitle: No long contracts. Cancel or change plans anytime.
pricing.footer: © 2026 SocialPro. Designed for maximum aesthetic conversion.

starter.desc: The essentials to start shaping your first ideas.

pro.desc: For professional creators who want consistency and conversion.

agency.desc: Maximum AI power for agencies, brands and growing teams.

pricing.faq1q: How does the AI simulation work?
pricing.faq1a: SocialPro uses an intelligent deterministic generator in a Sandbox environment to simulate optimized responses instantly, without consuming external API credits.
pricing.faq2q: Can I change my plan at any time?
pricing.faq2a: Yes! You can upgrade or downgrade plans directly in your Brand Kit settings, with proportional billing adjustment.
